title: Learn at Your Own Pace
intro: Choose the Swahili Safari track that matches your stay, or continue with higher-level and conversational coaching.

items.title: Swahili Safari 1
items.description: Tailored for visitors staying for up to one month. Focus on practical day-to-day Swahili for travel and daily interactions.

items.title: Swahili Safari 2
items.description: Tailored for visitors staying for a maximum of 3 months. Builds confidence for social, travel, and routine communication.

items.title: Swahili Safari 3 (Swahili Beginners Course)
items.description: Tailored for visitors staying for up to one year. A complete beginner path from essentials to confident, independent use.

items.title: Intermediate Level
items.description: For learners ready to expand vocabulary, improve grammar accuracy, and communicate more naturally across everyday topics.

items.title: Advanced Level
items.description: For fluent learners who want mastery in nuanced expression, complex structures, and professional or academic communication.

items.title: Conversational Swahili
items.description: Focused speaking practice to help you hold real-life conversations smoothly, confidently, and with better listening skills.
